_note: CANONICAL ship registry — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH shared by the citizen toolbelt (lib/ships.js) AND the seas-server. Both require this SAME file via '../seas/citizen/lib/ships.json' — that relative path resolves identically locally (game/server -> game/seas/...) and on the VPS (/var/www/tasern/server -> /var/www/tasern/seas/...). Addresses verified 2026-07-06 (see lib/ships.js provenance). homePort = the port location id (q*1000+r) a ship starts docked at; the server seeds ship POSITION from it and the house may move a ship later (state.ships). Sol del Mar has no rowVault (oars-less, in the launch queue) so it is NOT rowable and takes no rowing hands.

ships.name: Sol del Mar
ships.note: no rowVault deployed — this ship has no oars wired yet, so it takes no rowing hands and its crew cannot row until one exists (founder-gated).
